plan_set_components: Architectural plans — floor plans all levels, sections, elevations, site plan, roof plan
Structural plans — foundation plan and details, framing, connections, stepped foundation system for rolling terrain
MEP coordination drawings — electrical single-line, panel schedules, plumbing and hydraulic layout, HVAC zoned system
Lighting plans — design-led fixture layout all zones, dimming control system
Fire protection plans — sprinkler layout and design basis, fire alarm integration
AV / technology infrastructure plans — in-room AV casitas, public area AV, network backbone
Solar PV system drawings — rooftop and ground-mount array layout, battery storage, grid tie-in
Greywater recycling system drawings — collection, biofilter treatment, reuse distribution
Detail sheets — wall sections, ceiling details, lobby feature elements, casita millwork, pool surround
Finish schedule — all surfaces, all zones, all room types
FF&E specification document — room-by-room specification all 9 program zones
